---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 提出改进建议或新能力需求 / Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 问题背景 / 使用场景 / Problem / Use Case

你想解决什么问题？  
What problem are you trying to solve?

## 期望方案 / Proposed Solution

请描述你希望的行为。  
Describe the behavior you want.

## 已考虑的替代方案 / Alternatives Considered

你评估过哪些替代方案？  
What alternatives did you evaluate?

## 预期收益 / Expected Impact

- 谁会受益？ / Who benefits?
- 改善了什么流程？ / What workflow is improved?

## 补充说明 / Additional Notes

可补充示例、链接或草图。  
Add examples, links, or mockups if useful.
